description: Create a Talon Voice configuration for reviewing bodycam footage in a new folder at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bodycam_review\. The configuration must include a Python file bodycam.py that defines a Talon Module with an action log_bodycam_event(event_desc: str) to append the system timestamp and event description to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bodycam_review_log.csv. It must also include a bodycam.talon file, active only for windows with 'BodyCam' in the title, that maps voice commands to keys: 'video play' (k), 'video pause' (k), 'skip forward' (l), 'skip back' (j), 'frame next' (.), 'frame back' (,), 'speed up' (shift->), and 'speed down' (shift-<). The Talon file must also include a 'log event <user.text>' command that calls the custom log_bodycam_event action.
